landing.hero_subtitle: GenAI-Powered Smart Stadium Ecosystem for FIFA World Cup 2026
landing.modules_desc: Four AI-powered modules working in concert to deliver the smartest World Cup in history.
landing.fan_desc: AI-powered navigation, multilingual assistant, personalized concessions, and real-time wayfinding for 82,500 fans.
landing.ops_desc: Real-time crowd density management, AI incident response, gate throughput analytics, and predictive intelligence.
landing.staff_desc: Task coordination, shift management, AI decision support, and volunteer deployment for 50+ on-duty personnel.
landing.sustain_desc: Energy consumption tracking, solar generation, carbon offset metrics, waste diversion, and AI green recommendations.
landing.footer_text: GenAI-Powered Smart Stadium Management Platform — FIFA World Cup 2026

fan.title: Fan Experience Hub
fan.subtitle: Your personalized AI assistant for match day
fan.nav_desc: Generate instant walking directions from your current zone.
fan.nav_note: Route updates in real-time based on stadium density.
fan.chat_empty_desc: Ask any question about restrooms, food stands, match details, or transportation. Try typing in any language!
fan.concessions_note: Data updates dynamically based on register transactions.
fan.rating_note: Your feedback updates the operational dashboards in real-time.

ops.title: Operations Control Room
ops.subtitle: Platform Operational Command Desk — Real-Time Surveillance & Logistics
ops.decision_support_desc: Describe an emergency, hazard, or operational query, and Claude will output a structured stadium incident response action plan.
ops.describe_placeholder: e.g. Turnstiles at Gate D reporting scanner issues causing queue length to hit 100 meters...
ops.decision_log_note: Decisions log is automatically compiled into the post-match FIFA dispatch audit.
ops.steward_deployment_desc: Active assignments by zone and current status metrics.

sustain.title: Sustainability Dashboard
sustain.subtitle: Green Stadium Intelligence
sustain.energy_tip_title: AI Energy Tip of the Match
sustain.transport_desc: Lower private vehicles = lower stadium carbon footprint
sustain.ai_report_desc: Claude analyzes all metrics and generates actionable green operations guidance.
sustain.report_placeholder: Generate a comprehensive AI-powered sustainability analysis covering energy efficiency, environmental impact, and actionable green recommendations.
